---
title: "Aaron Powell"
subtitle: "CPT MI KSARNG"
image: images/DOD.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
---

<div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; margin: 10px 0;">
<img src="images/icons/flagpack--gb-nir.svg" style="height:22px; vertical-align: middle; border: none; outline: none;">
<img src="images/icons/flagpack--ca.svg" style="height:22px; vertical-align: middle; border: none; outline: none;">
<img src="images/icons/flagpack--au.svg" style="height:22px; vertical-align: middle; border: none; outline: none">
<img src="images/icons/flagpack--ie.svg" style="height:22px; vertical-align: middle; border: none; outline: none;">
<img src="images/icons/flagpack--jo.svg" style="height:22px; vertical-align: middle; border: none; outline: none;">
<img src="images/icons/flagpack--kw.svg" style="height:22px; vertical-align: middle; border: none; outline: none;">
<img src="images/icons/flagpack--qa.svg" style="height:22px; vertical-align: middle; border: none; outline: none;">
</div>

Intelligence Manager with 15 years experience providing strategic planning and problem solving. Investment Broker with 10 years experience in derivaties trading and portfolio management.

In the quiet architecture of human potential a steady pulse of purpose flows forward, shaping raw potential into clear, reliable order with meticulous care and tireless drive that stays steady through every challenge. Elegant paths cut cleanly through uncertainty and excess hesitation, leaning toward honest outcomes while still leaving room for genuine connection, as an unshakable calm wraps around every shift like deep water reflecting sunlight. Curious sparks light up new ideas and confident exchanges, weaving assertive energy with sharp efficiency that transforms vision into shared success.
